name: Desktop Engine
short_description: Desktop Engine transforms your desktop into an interactive stage with real-time 3D characters, dynamic overlays, and customizable avatars—perfect for streamers, gamers, or anyone looking to personalize their workspace.
detailed_description:
Desktop Engine: Rediscover Your Desktop

Desktop Engine is innovative software that transforms static backgrounds into a dynamic and interactive space by bringing 2D and 3D characters, chat boxes, avatar systems, and more to your desktop. Whether you're a streamer, a gamer, or just a user wanting to personalize your desktop; Desktop Engine offers a unique, lively, and fully controllable experience for you.

Animate your characters with viewer interactions during your streams, create immersive animated scenes in the background while gaming, or simply build your own unique world on your desktop. Desktop Engine combines advanced background capabilities with powerful character and interaction-focused tools.

FEATURES

Desktop Engine offers you many tools to use. Some of these tools are as follows.

Ready Content Packs & Easy Import:

Start having fun right away with our ready-made packages, or easily import your own 3D models, animations, and other assets using our comprehensive content management menu.

Powerful Built-in Editor:

Everything you need to create your dream desktop is in one place:

  • Model Configuration: Easily move, resize, rotate your models, and even align them to windows. Protect your settings with the lock feature.

  • Avatar System: Create your own avatars or customize existing ones.

  • Animation Library and Control: Access hundreds of ready-made animations for humanoid characters or assign your own custom animations.

  • Dynamic Physics Engine: Add realistic physics rules to your characters and objects, getting rid of static poses, and feel the interaction and dynamism.

Full Control: Placement and Sizing

Move your characters exactly where you want, adjust their size, and snap them to windows. When you find the perfect layout, lock it with the Lock button, so your settings stay safe.

Integrated Physics System

Add realistic reactions and movements to your models using our built-in physics engine. Configure easily through the editor and switch from a static appearance to dynamic interaction.

Snap to Window and Taskbar

Drag your characters on the window and let them sit. 

Do you want them sleep on your desktop. 

Performance

Don't compromise on performance! Desktop Engine is designed with low CPU and GPU usage in mind. Enjoy animating your desktop as you wish while the application runs smoothly in the background.

Wide Format Support:

  • Supported Formats: Seamlessly use common 3D model formats like .vrm, .glb, .gltf.

  • VRM Convenience: Directly import .vrm characters created with tools like VRoid Studio without needing additional conversion.

  • Performance-Oriented Design:

    • Optimized to use minimal system resources for a smooth and uninterrupted experience on your desktop. Enjoy your creativity without sacrificing performance.

  • Interactive Experience:

    • Mouse and Eye Tracking: Create a more lively and realistic interaction by having your characters' gaze and head movements follow your mouse cursor.

    • Touch Reactions: Have your characters give you special reactions when you move the mouse near specific areas.

Why Desktop Engine?

Desktop Engine offers much more than a standard desktop application. Its powerful built-in editor, support for both 2D and 3D models, physics engine, optimized performance, and interactive features like mouse/eye tracking give you the freedom to create a completely unique and lively desktop experience.

Bring your desktop to life with Desktop Engine, add your characters and dreams, and enjoy the fun!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Bulgarian, Danish, Indonesian, Dutch, Finnish, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Greek, Czech, Swedish
